name: exec-recruiter
description: Your personal executive recruiter for senior Product Leadership job hunts (CPO, VP/SVP Product, Head of Product). Dual sourcing across LinkedIn AND major ATS domains (Greenhouse, Lever, Workday, Ashby, etc.) via Google site: search. Fit-scored triage, JD-tailored CV generation, contact-aware outreach drafts, and approval-gated sends. Configure for your ICP, geo, and CV; the plugin handles the rest.
